title: From Payday Desperation to Payday Strategy: How to Make the Shift
description: For many people, payday is not just financial — it’s emotional. The days before salary hits feel tense. You start calculating what’s left, postponing purchases, hoping nothing urgent comes up. Then the salary lands and relief washes over you. For a moment, everything feels possible again.
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: What to Do When Your Money Is Running Low Mid-Month
description: Running low mid-month is one of the most common financial experiences — especially in an economy where expenses are rising faster than salaries. The goal isn’t to panic. The goal is to respond strategically.
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: January Money Anxiety: Why It Happens and How to Manage It
description: January can feel like a financial hangover. After the holidays, many Kenyans face a sudden reality check: festive loans and a bank account that looks much thinner than it did in December. This post-holiday stress is commonly known as January money anxiety. Understanding why it happens—and how to manage it—can help you start the year on a stronger financial footing.
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: Kenyans to Pay Higher NSSF Rates, China Extends SGR Loan Repayment
description: Kenyans to pay higher NSSF rates from February 2026. China agrees to extend the SGR loan repayment to 2040. PSC announces entry-level jobs in government ministries and teaching jobs in technical institutes. Optcoin platform collapses with investors' money. All this and more in today’s Money Weekly newsletter. But first, a closer look at the new NSSF rates.
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: What December Spending Patterns Say About Your Money Habits
description: December is often treated like a financial exception month. Salaries and bonuses come in, routines break, and spending becomes more emotional, social, and impulsive. But how you spend in December is not random; it reveals the money habits you carry all year, just under less pressure.
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: Does a Savings Challenge Work? Here are 5 Things to Consider
description: An effective savings challenge should improve your financial position long after it ends — not just restrict you for a month and leave you financially stressed afterwards. Here are five things to check to audit whether your savings challenge is actually helping you.
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: Feeling Derailed? How to Reset Your Finances After a Rough Month
description: Tough month financially? Don’t panic! 😓💡 Everyone slips up now and then—but the key is how you bounce back. Here's your practical, no-guilt guide to getting your money back on track starting today.
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: Feeling Bad After Spending Your Own Money? 6 Simple Rules to Avoid Money Guilt
description: The month has hit a critical juncture where salaried individuals have become cognisant of their daily budgets. A time when you buy something, feel a quick thrill... then the guilt creeps in. “Did I really need that?” “Could that money have gone somewhere smarter?” And suddenly, what felt like a moment of joy becomes a quiet shame spiral.
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: CS Mbadi Explains Dropping MMF Returns, Trump's 5% Tax on Kenyans, Making First Million at 25
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: 7,200 Kenyans Are Worth Above Ksh128 Million; 5 Things They Are Doing Differently
description: Kenya is now home to 7,200 high-net-worth individuals (HNWI) — these are dollar millionaires worth at least Ksh128 million each. And while most of us are out here chasing paychecks, juggling side hustles, and braving rising costs, these financial elites have cracked the code on building, protecting, and growing their wealth.
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: 5 Ways to Unlock Hidden Savings💰
description: Saving is not for the rich or those with big paychecks—it’s for anyone who wants to build a better financial future. Did you know that even small tweaks in your spending can free up money you never thought you had? In this edition, we’re sharing five simple ways to find extra cash to save, no matter your income. Let’s get started!
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: Haiti Mission Billions, SACCO Scandals, and Pension Limits: Top Money Stories
description: This week, Kenya’s financial landscape saw major budget shifts — from a Ksh7.5B boost for the police service, including Ksh2.5B for the Haiti security mission, to a proposed pension law set to lock retirement savings until age 50. We also track rising fuel prices, SACCO restructuring, and key changes in government spending.
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: Small Steps to Make 2025 the Year You Unlock Passive Income 💰🚀
description: Most people wait for "extra money" to start building passive income. But what if you could start today with what you already have? 💡 In this edition of Wallet Wellness, we break down small, practical steps to unlock passive income in 2025. Ready to make your money work for you? Let’s get right to it! 💸✨
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: SHA Targets Kenyans’ Mobile Money Data, Car Ownership Records in Bid to Raise SHIF Contributions
description: Significant shifts are underway in Kenya’s financial sector as reforms, budget challenges, and infrastructure projects take center stage. From major health sector reforms to increased debt burdens and funding strategies, the news highlights both fiscal pressures and initiatives.
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: Should You Merge Finances With Your Partner? 💑💰
description: 💑 Money and love: A perfect partnership or a financial headache? This week’s Wallet Wellness explores the pros, cons, and best strategies for managing money as a couple. Because love is priceless, but financial peace? Even better!
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: Hunt for SACCOs’ Stolen Billions Begins
description: A forensic audit has exposed a Ksh13.3 billion fraud at KUSCCO, with top executives implicated in falsified financial statements and bribery. Meanwhile, motorists face potential new taxes and fuel price hikes
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: How to Show Your Future Self Some Love by Organizing Your Finances 💕📊
description: For many, Valentine’s is about chocolates and roses, but what if the best gift you give is to yourself? 💝 This week, we’re flipping the script—show your future self some love by organizing your finances today. A little planning now means a more secure, stress-free tomorrow. Let’s talk about the money moves that will make your future self proud!
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: Compatibility Check: 6 Signs That You and Your Partner Are Financially Compatible 💵💑
description: Money, admittedly, can bring couples closer or push them apart in many ways. It’s not only about how much you have but something more crucial. Are you and your partner financially in sync? Discover the six signs of financial compatibility in this week’s edition of Wallet Wellness.
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: Less is More: Surviving the 59 Days of Njaanuary 🥵
description: For many, January feels like the longest month of the year, but it doesn’t have to be the hardest. This week’s Wallet Wellness brings you 5 actionable tips to make it through Njaanuary with less stress and more financial clarity. Let’s make ‘less is more’ your winning mantra this month!
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: Return on Top Passive Income Investments Soars Past 20%
description: In this week’s highlights we have: high returns on an infrastructure bond, Mansa-X’s impressive performance, and new taxes raising the cost of essentials. Plus, insurance withdrawals hit Ksh13 billion, satellite internet providers face high fees, and retirement savings just got a boost!
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: KRA's Christmas Gift for Kenyan Workers as State Rolls Out Special Mortgage for Village Homes
description: KRA has announced that Housing Levy and SHIF contributions will no longer be subject to PAYE tax, starting December 2024. This adjustment, under the Finance Act 2023, offers a timely income boost for workers, especially those with higher earnings. Simultaneously, the government is launching affordable mortgages for rural homes, enabling workers in village areas to access loans of up to Ksh10 million at favorable interest rates.
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: 5 Simple Steps to Set Yourself Up for Financial Success in 2025 💪 ✨
description: Ready to take charge of your finances in 2025? 🌟💼 Discover 5 simple, actionable steps to reflect, strategize, and build the financial future you deserve—because a clear plan today means confidence tomorrow. Let’s get started!
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: 6 Easy Steps to Make Your Budget Work in 2025 💰📝
description: Ready to take charge of your money in 2025? Let’s uncover the simple steps to build a budget that works, and help you approach the new year with confidence no matter the curveballs life throws at you!
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: Six Things To Be Grateful For In 2024 🙏 😇
description: Gratitude is the secret ingredient to finding joy in progress. As we close out 2024, let’s pause, reflect, and celebrate the lessons, wins, and resilience that carried us through. Join us in counting our blessings as we set the stage for an even brighter 2025.
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: 23 Insurance Companies Risk Closure as Govt Warns Loss-Making Saccos
description: The Insurance Regulatory Authority has revealed that 23 Kenyan insurance companies ended 2023 with a Ksh32.2 billion capital shortfall, raising fears of potential closures due to non-compliance with minimum capital requirements. At the same time, the government has issued a stern warning to loss-making Saccos against using borrowed funds to pay dividends.
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: Money Wasters to Leave Behind in 2024 for a Healthier Financial Future 💸
description: Ready to leave behind the habits that quietly drain your wallet? Let’s uncover the culprits, rethink your spending, and make 2025 your most financially empowered year yet.
author: Money254 Money Weekly

title: Holiday Scams to Watch Out For and How to Stay Safe 🛡️
description: Do not drop your guard even with the holiday cheer! 🎄✨ This week, we’re exposing the top holiday scams and sharing quick tips to keep your money safe. Stay vigilant, and let the festivities roll on worry-free!
author: Money254 Money Weekly
